title: The Charter Hotel in Downtown Seattle Review — Gemini Connect
content: # The Charter Hotel in Downtown Seattle Review. The Charter Hotel is one of the newest boutique hotels in downtown Seattle. ## A Great Hotel in Downtown. We had a standard room with a king bed and a city view of downtown on the 15th floor, just below the hotel’s rooftop bar, the Fog Room (more on that below). One of the reasons is the ample amount of activities to do in the downtown core. If you’re staying at the Charter, you are within walking distance of most of Seattle’s biggest attractions, so it’s best to spend your free time outdoors. Martin and I travel frequently for both pleasure and work, and it was apparent to us that the Charter Hotel is made to appeal to business travelers. This was one of the best steaks that we have ever had in Seattle and it reminded us of our wedding dinner in Italy.
